title: GPS Ruler
profTagline: GPS ruler — measure distances and areas as a coordinate polyline: segments, total length, area, GPS accuracy
installDesc: Works offline, opens like an app
installIosHint: In Safari: tap Share, then Add to Home Screen.
installGenericHint: In the browser menu choose Install or Add to Home Screen.
arHint: Point the camera at a surface, drop points and measure in real metres (cm-accurate).
arUnsupported: This browser or device does not provide WebXR AR. It needs Android with ARCore (Google Play Services for AR); iOS and Safari have no WebXR at all.
